{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Aetheric power
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Eurias]] runs with [[Aetheric power]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
